### SPARKLINE
The values representing the y-axis values of a sparkline graph for a given aggregation over a period of time.

```esql
FROM employees
| STATS sparkline = SPARKLINE(COUNT(*), hire_date, 20, "1985-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1985-12-31T00:00:00Z")
```
